Bus Timings

E201 Bus Schedule Dubai to Al Ain

November 27, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dreaming of escaping Dubai’s hustle for Al Ain’s tranquil oasis? The E201 bus is your ticket to ride! This handy route connects Dubai’s skyscrapers to Al Ain’s UNESCO-listed palm groves and ancient irrigation systems. It’s an easy way to swap city lights for natural sights without the hassle of driving. Curious about how to hop on this Dubai-to-Al Ain express? Let’s dive into the E201 bus details and get you on your way to exploring the UAE’s greener side. Contents

E201 Bus Timings

The E201 bus operates daily, offering commuters a reliable means of travel between Dubai and Al Ain. With frequent departures throughout the day, passengers can embark on their journey from as early as 6:20 AM to as late as 9:20 PM on weekdays, and from 7:20 AM to 11:20 PM on weekends.

These timings ensure flexibility for travelers, accommodating various schedules and preferences. Here is the timetable of E201 Bus.

From Ghubaiba Bus Station (Dubai) From Al Ain
03:20 06:00
04:30 07:10
05:35 08:35
06:35 09:40
07:40 10:40
08:50 11:35
09:55 12:35
10:50 13:25
11:50 14:25
12:45 15:25
13:40 16:25
14:40 17:25
15:40 18:20
16:25 19:00
17:10 19:55
18:05 20:50
19:00 21:50
20:00 22:45
21:00 23:45
22:00 00:50

Download PDF Bus E201

For full schedule details, you can visit the official RTA website, or simply follow this link for E201 Bus Timings.

E201 Bus Route

The journey along the E201 route unfolds through a series of strategically located stops, catering to both residential and commercial areas.

Commencing from the iconic Al Ghubaiba Bus Station in Dubai, passengers embark on a scenic ride passing through stops such asWasl Club,Nad Al Shiba, andAl Qattara Oasis East, among others, before reaching the final destination atAl Ain Central Bus Station.

Each stop serves as a gateway to different neighborhoods, ensuring accessibility for all commuters. And here are the complete route stops of E201 Bus.1. Al Ghubaiba Bus Station 12

  1. Wasl, Wasl Club

  2. Nad Al Shiba, Emirates NBD

  3. Al Qattara Oasis East

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Ain Gift Markets

  2. Al Slimi Park

  3. Eid Praying Ground

  4. Al Madina Petrol Station

  5. Al Ain Central Bus Station

Affordability is a key feature of the E201 bus service,with a one-way ticket priced at a reasonable 25 AED. This cost-effective fare makes the bus an attractive option for budget-conscious travelers, providing an economical alternative to private transportation.

Covering a distance of approximately 139 kilometers, the journey from Dubai to Al Ain via the E201 bus typicallytakes around 2 hours and 15 minutes.

The E201 buses are equipped with modern amenities aimed at enhancing passenger comfort and convenience.

From air conditioning to spacious seating arrangements, commuters can relax and enjoy a smooth journey. Additionally, designated sections for passengers with specific needs ensure inclusivity, while onboard entertainment options add a touch of leisure to the ride.## Journey Experience

The E201 bus from Dubai to Al Ain takes passengers on a long but comfortable journey, passing through the scenic town of Al Faqa. The journey continues through more remote areas before arriving in Al Ain, often referred to as the “Garden City” for its greenery and natural beauty.

Al Ain is home to the famous Al Ain Oasis, a UNESCO World Heritage site, and the impressive Jebel Hafeet mountain, which offers breathtaking views of the region.

The E201 bus route stands as a testament to the UAE’s commitment to providing efficient and accessible public transportation options. With its reliable schedule, affordable fares, and comfortable amenities, the E201 bus offers a seamless travel experience for those journeying between Dubai and Al Ain.

Whether for work or leisure, hop aboard the E201 bus and embark on a hassle-free voyage through the heart of the Emirates.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 27, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
